trails.name: CAPE KIDNAPPERS - BEACH TO PLATEAU COLON
Mahia Peninsula Scenic Reserve Track
trails.description: Walk through one of the best examples of semi coastal forest on the east coast of the North Island on this loop track - it's suitable for older children.

trails.name: Cape Kidnappers/Te Kauwae-a-Māui Route
trails.description: This route is along a beach and is subject to landslides and rockfall. It can only be attempted at low tide.
